title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro (128 GB) - Blue Titanium
description: Experience the ultimate iPhone with a durable and lightweight aerospace-grade titanium design. Features a pro camera system with 48MP main camera and the powerful A17 Pro chip for next-level performance and mobile gaming.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones - Midnight Blue
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with two processors controlling 8 microphones. Enjoy exceptional sound quality and crystal-clear hands-free calling with the new Sony WH-1000XM5.

title: Premium Mechanical Keyboard - Ocean Blue
description: A high-performance mechanical keyboard with custom-tuned switches and vibrant RGB lighting. Built with a solid aluminum frame for durability and style.

title: Minimalist Smart Watch - Cobalt Blue
description: Stay connected and track your fitness with this sleek, minimalist smart watch. Features heart rate monitoring, GPS, and a stunning AMOLED display.

title: Wireless Ergonomic Mouse - Arctic Blue
description: Designed for comfort and precision, this wireless mouse features an ergonomic shape and customizable buttons. Perfect for long hours of work or play.

title: Men's Slim Fit Polo - Navy Blue
description: A classic slim-fit polo shirt made from premium cotton for a soft and breathable feel. Versatile enough for casual outings or semi-formal events.

title: Unisex Canvas Sneakers - Sky Blue
description: Timeless canvas sneakers with a durable rubber sole. Lightweight and comfortable for everyday wear, featuring a vibrant sky blue color.

title: Modern Ceramic Vase - Royal Blue
description: Add a touch of elegance to your home with this handcrafted ceramic vase. Its deep royal blue glaze and modern silhouette make it a perfect centerpiece.

title: Velvet Throw Pillow - Deep Sea Blue
description: Ultra-soft velvet throw pillow that adds comfort and luxury to any sofa or bed. Features a rich deep sea blue color and high-quality filling.

title: Hydrating Eye Serum - Azure Extract
description: Revitalize your eyes with our hydrating serum, infused with natural Azure extracts. Reduces puffiness and dark circles for a refreshed look.

title: MacBook Air M2 Laptop - 13.6-inch
description: The redesigned MacBook Air with the M2 chip. Incredibly thin and fast, with a brilliant Liquid Retina display and up to 18 hours of battery life.

title: Natural Bamboo Cutting Board Set
description: Durable and eco-friendly cutting boards made from 100% natural bamboo. Gentle on knives and easy to clean, perfect for any kitchen.

title: Leather Travel Duffel Bag - Dark Brown
description: Handcrafted from genuine leather, this duffel bag is perfect for weekend getaways. Features a spacious interior and classic vintage design.

title: Cotton Canvas Weekend Tote Bag
description: A durable and stylish tote bag made from heavy-duty cotton canvas. Spacious enough for all your essentials, with reinforced handles for comfort.
